summary: Resolved 3 sorries in DensityFrameCondition.lean using reflexivity contradiction patterns. Remaining 9 sorries (6 in DensityFrameCondition, 3 in CantorApplication) genuinely require Pattern C iteration - the constructed witnesses are equivalent to endpoints in reflexive cases. Direct proof approaches exhausted; mathematical analysis confirms iteration is necessary.

artifacts.summary: Detailed progress and analysis of remaining sorries

partial_progress.details: Resolved 3 sorries using reflexivity contradiction patterns. Remaining 9 sorries require Pattern C iteration - strictDensityWithFuel function with fuel-based recursion, seriality escape helpers, and termination proof via Nat.strongRecOn.

next_steps: Implement Pattern C iteration: (1) strictDensityWithFuel with fuel-based recursion, (2) seriality_escape helpers, (3) fuel_suffices termination proof, (4) compose density_frame_condition_strict. Estimated 4-5 hours remaining.
